title: Issuance of Closure Order. Upon the determination of the MWPB Director
content: 44 or the Regional Director that the activities of any entity constitute a danger to national 45 security and public order or may lead to further exploitation of job seekers, through the 46 conduct of ex-parte examination of complainants and witnesses or through the conduct 47 of surveillance, the Undersecretary for Licensing and Adjudication shall issue a Closure 48 Order. 49 50
